exec_args.sql: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00' AND status = 'Closed' AND id IN (SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1) GROUP BY ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(ch.caseid__c) AS total_cases_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00' AND c.status = 'Closed' GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(ch.caseid__c) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(ch.caseid__c) AS total_cases_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00' AND c.status = 'Closed' GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(ch.caseid__c) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;
